name: My Hero Academia V.2
description:
1. Welcome back, everyone. As I'm sure you know, my previous bot had some rather interesting kinks and problems that ended in me sitting down on my desk for a few long, tortures hours to make what V.2 of my bot. This time with even more content for less tokens! Whoa, who would have thought you could have more for less? After contacting one of the admins of Janitor A.I, I realized I could easily summarize what the characters had. So that's what I did!

  2. So you guys must be wondering, "What's next after this? Locking more content under chats?" Yes. Yes I shall. As for what, I still have no idea. But I'll be brainstorming. This bot already has every major character in MHA, along with the villains of MHA, You're Next Movie. But for now, I can take a break.

  1. 11/19/25. I hope this finds everyone well. But I'm afraid I can't go on anymore. I've never been good enough, nothing I've done has ever worked out. I'm nothing, I don't fit in. Hell, I've been cringing for even making this bot and adding these new story arcs. As my last update for a very long time, I'm summarizing everything as much as I can, remove a bunch of unneeded characters (Mainly ones that don't relate to MHA) and that's pretty much it. Goodbye.
creator: The_Qingming_Bird
